# Guilty Spark

> Halo Infinite match statistics and live series tracking for Discord servers and OBS overlays.

Guilty Spark is a Discord bot and web platform that brings Halo Infinite stats into Discord servers
and streaming setups. It tracks custom games via NeatQueue league integration, provides live
in-game overlays for OBS, and lets teams monitor series scores, match history, and player performance
in real time.

## Pages

- [Home](https://guilty-spark.app/): Product overview, feature highlights, and Discord install CTA.
- [Capabilities](https://guilty-spark.app/capabilities): Full capability reference across Discord automation, live series tracking, Individual Tracker workflows, and OBS-ready overlays.
- [Discord Commands](https://guilty-spark.app/discord-commands): Reference guide for all Guilty Spark slash commands — setup, stats, live tracking, and utility workflows.
- [OBS Overlay Guide](https://guilty-spark.app/guides/obs-overlays): Step-by-step instructions for setting up a Guilty Spark stream overlay in OBS.
- [FAQ](https://guilty-spark.app/faq): Frequently asked questions about Discord automation, Individual Tracker workflows, and overlay setup.
- [Privacy Policy](https://guilty-spark.app/privacy-policy): Privacy policy for Guilty Spark services and website tools.
- [Terms of Service](https://guilty-spark.app/terms-of-service): Terms of service for Guilty Spark services and website tools.

## Key Concepts

- **Individual Tracker**: A per-user durable tracker that monitors live Halo Infinite matches, feeds real-time overlay data, and maintains match history for a configured gamertag.
- **Series Tracking**: NeatQueue integration that captures in-series context (teams, scores, match IDs) and drives overlay UI switching between in-series and matchmaking modes.
- **OBS Overlay**: A browser-source overlay with a live ticker, match tabs, series score bar, and stats highlights panel — all driven by Individual Tracker data over WebSocket.
- **Discord Bot**: Slash commands for stats lookup (`/stats`, `/servicerecord`), map generation (`/maps`), live tracker management (`/track`), and server setup (`/setup`).
